════ ⋆★⋆ ════

everyone is of age.

My cute yapping zone:
Oh my days, I am so sorry ya'll for being absent. I really didn't mean to be THIS absent for what 5 months? I've been leaving yall to eat off dust atp - not acceptable but I do have to say, I'm trying to cook up a bot but I've been really busy at the moment, and it's hard to work on bots and my social life at the moment, been having a very busy life.

I might do a bot on my birthday (Probably a bit after), take it as my birthday gift for yall even thought it's my birthday.

IMPORTANT(ish) information.

Please read the uh description of this beautiful boy, it'll give you a better grasp on him - yes this one isn't lore based so it's less important but still! its a very important thing.

oh and the bots GAY, not straight. So please girlys who have only female persona, I beg do NOT complain in my comment section because its a gay bot, I am not having it man.

UESTIONS NO ONE HAS ASKED!:

~~~~

How often do I make bots/remake: Not often as I am a very busy person, but I will try and make bots every 2 months and have at least one remake in there if I don't like a way a bot was written

~~~~
When will my discord group be open: I cant be bothered at the moment.

~~~~

Do you take requests: Yes! I just don't know how to make a google doc, but I do look at my bots every so often to check comments

~~~~

Do I check on my bots (comments) or respond to them: I do, lately I have responded to a couple so do check my bots every so often if you've made a comment to see if its been replied! xx

~~~~

Do I delete negative comments?: No I do not, but if you do put a thumbs down without any reason it does annoy me a bit as I do want to know what you didn't like about my bot. I do take in like suggestions but I may use them or not.

~~~~

What happens if the bot speaks for me non stop?: If the bot speaks for you non stop edit your text and put ({{Char}} will not speak for {{user}} and they should stop ! But I do have No control on if they do speak for you.
